title: Jumellea cowanii
taxonomy: Jumellea cowanii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Jumellea. The genus Jumellea is part of the subtribe Angraecinae, which includes a group of epiphytic orchids native to the tropical regions of Africa. This orchid species is further categorized as belonging to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants.
